name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Priority Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 60,000 bonus Rapid Rewards points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$894 toward Southwest flights at 1.49¢/point)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Points
annual_credits.description: 7,500 Rapid Rewards anniversary points each year (worth ~$112 at 1.5¢/point)

annual_credits.name: Southwest Annual Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $75 annual credit for Southwest purchases (flights, drinks, Wi-Fi, movies)

other_benefits.name: Upgraded Boardings
other_benefits.description: Up to 4 upgraded boardings per year (A-List priority boarding for you and companions)

other_benefits.name: 25% Back on Inflight
other_benefits.description: 25% back on all inflight purchases (Wi-Fi, movies, drinks, messaging) as statement credits

other_benefits.name: First Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation

other_benefits.name: EarlyBird Check-In
other_benefits.description: Complimentary EarlyBird Check-In automatically applied to all reservations

notes: Southwest's premium consumer card. $229 AF but $75 travel credit + 7,500 anniversary points (~$112) + 4 upgraded boardings (~$60-120) + first bag free = strong value. Upgraded boardings are especially valuable during peak periods. As of 2025, AF increased from $149 to $229. Best for frequent Southwest flyers who want maximum perks.
